task_description: rc.20 Cite policy — AI 回复首行 KB: <id> 闭环 + fab doctor --cite-coverage 算账。MEMORY project_cite_policy.md 锁了 6 scenarios + 8 details。rc.20 scope: Claude Code first-class + Codex assume-and-test;Cursor 推 rc.21。

auto_orchestrator_decisions.cursor_capture: deferred to rc.21 (PreToolUse only sees tool_input, not assistant reply text — needs different mechanism)
auto_orchestrator_decisions.codex_stop_hook: assume-and-test; fallback to events.jsonl reconstruction (non-realtime) if shape differs
auto_orchestrator_decisions.turn_boundary_in_envelope: first non-empty text line of first text block in assistant message
auto_orchestrator_decisions.turn_id_field: new field in assistant_turn_observed event; generated from session_id + envelope_index
auto_orchestrator_decisions.client_bucket: new literal field client: 'cc' | 'codex' (Cursor scope: rc.21)
auto_orchestrator_decisions.cli_shape: --cite-coverage flag that switches doctor to fast-path (skip 28-check pipeline)
